channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: China's latest EV is a 'connected' car from smart phone and electronics maker Xiaomi
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — Xiaomi, a well-known maker of smart consumer electronics in China, is joining the country's booming but crowded market for electric cars.
item.dc:creator: KEN MORITSUGU, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump Media, Reddit surge despite questionable profit prospects, taking on the 'meme stock' mantle
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Reddit and Trump Media are the first notable social media companies to begin trading publicly in the last five years. They're also, thanks to the rabid reception among investors coupled with the companies' fuzzy profit outlooks, the latest meme stocks.
item.dc:creator: AP, ABC 4

item.title: TikTok is under investigation by the FTC over data practices and could face a lawsuit
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Federal Trade Commission is investigating TikTok over its data and security practices, a probe that could lead to a settlement or a lawsuit against the company, according to a person familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Dutch hyperloop center aims to advance futuristic transport technology
item.description: VEENDAM, Netherlands (AP) — A 420-meter (quarter-mile) white steel tube running alongside a railway line in the windswept northern Netherlands could usher in a new era in the transportation of people and freight.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CORDER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Florida's DeSantis signs one of the country's most restrictive social media bans for minors
item.description: TALLAHASSEE, Fla. (AP) — Florida will have one of the country's most restrictive social media bans for minors — if it withstands expected legal challenges — under a bill signed by Republican Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis on Monday.
item.dc:creator: BRENDAN FARRINGTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Tired of AI doomsday tropes, Cohere CEO says his goal is technology that's 'additive to humanity'
item.description: Aidan Gomez can take some credit for the ‘T’ at the end of ChatGPT. He was part of a group of Google engineers who first introduced a new artificial intelligence model called a transformer. That helped set a foundation for today's generative AI boom that ChatGPT-maker OpenAI and others built upon.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, PIX 11
